name: ab-bench
description: A/B testing harness for Claude Code plugins. Creates experiment environments, launches paired control/test sessions with everything-else-equal configs, and produces comparative analysis reports (deterministic metrics + LLM contextualization) to drive plugin iteration.

experiments_root.title: Experiments root directory
experiments_root.description: Folder where ab-bench creates and stores A/B experiment environments (kept outside any plugin/project repo — env.json, seed files, run history, transcripts). Example: C:\Users\you\claude-experiments or ~/claude-experiments. Run /ab-bench:setup any time to set or change this.
